name: Tofu
tagline: AI bookkeeping platform with multi-language document processing and zero-config automation
description: Tofu is an AI bookkeeping platform that excels at multi-language document processing and zero-configuration automation. Named a Xero Global Emerging App of the Year Finalist in 2025, it serves 7 of the Top 10 Global Accounting Networks. The platform automatically processes documents in multiple languages, extracts data, and categorizes transactions.
